positive: A symmetrical, minimalist illustration featuring a majestic, stylized moon cycle composed of various phases (new moon, crescent, quarter, gibbous, full moon). The moon glyphs should be integrated into organic, flowing celestial elements like nebula swirls and stylized constellations. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, ethereal gold, and touches of dusty lavender. The style should be neo-art deco mixed with modern botanical illustration, giving a sophisticated, cosmic, and mystical feel. Composition must be clean and highly contrasting, suitable for a central print on a dark garment. Vector illustration quality, intricate linework, high contrast silhouette, centered composition, clean lines, no photorealism.
negative: photorealism, 3D render, blurry, grainy, jpeg artifacts, low quality, amateur, text, words, letters, watermark, logo, symbol, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, messy, cluttered, bright colors, cartoonish
